thread.title_full: Actor Withdraws Complaints Against Prominent Figures Amid Legal Turmoil | Kochi News - Times of India

author: Times Of India
title: Actor Withdraws Complaints Against Prominent Figures Amid Legal Turmoil | Kochi News - Times of India
text: Kochi: The actor who lodged complaints against seven persons, including MLA M Mukesh, actors Jayasurya and Edavela Babu, said on Friday that she will retract her complaints. The actor said she had endured an ordeal 15 years ago and left the state for her children's studies. After settling back in her native place later, she heard about the Hema committee report and decided to tell the truth after realizing that what she experienced earlier had not ended now.She said she was ready to face the consequences when she raised certain claims. She added that SIT officers had approached her with a positive intent. \"In between, a Pocso case was filed against me and it was the media that told me about it. The police did not call me about it. There is no evidence even after two months. The case has not been transferred to Chennai, where the offence occurred,\" she said.She said when she tried to get an update on the case against her, the police did not say anything. She then filed a complaint with the local police and the district police chief, stating that it was a ‘fabricated' case and an investigation is needed. \"I'm also a woman and I have two daughters... Just because I said what was true, I don't know who gave money to say such things against me. I'm someone who came forward with courage. Still, when a fabricated case was alleged against me, why is the govt not protecting me?\" she asked.She added that she was harassed on social media. \"No one is bothered about this. So, I'm withdrawing all the cases I filed. These tears that are rolling down my cheeks are a curse on Kerala,\" she said.She said that since a thorough investigation was not done in the ‘fabricated' Pocso case, she felt that the govt would not protect her and she lost faith.She said she would wait for three days for the truth to come out in the Pocso case and if she got a reply about her complaint, she is ready to go forward with the cases she filed. She added that she had evidence in these cases that will be presented during trial.
